description: The VectorGizmo component is used to allow editing a gizmo via the Dev tool.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to influence or a component this is on.
fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to position the gizmo at ``TargetSlot``.
fields._interactingComponent: The component like a Dev tool that is interacting with this gizmo.
fields._material: The material being used for the gizmo visual.
fields._toolPoint: The slot to position at the interacting tool's tip slot.
fields._activePoint: The slot to position at the active point.
fields._lineRoot: The slot that stores the line segment for tip based movement rather than projected mode.
fields._lineSegment: The mesh being used for the line visual to the interacting tool tip.
fields._snapHighlight: The slot storing the gizmo snap highlight visual.
fields.VectorSpace: The space to do edits to the vector in.
fields.TargetVector: The target vector field to modify.
fields.TargetRotation: The target vector rotation to modify.
fields.FixMagnitude: whether to fix a magnitude during/after editing.
fields.FixedMagnitude: The value to fix the vector magnitude to if ``FixMagnitude`` is enabled.
fields.VisualMagnitudeScale: The magnitude scalar of the vector visual.
fields.VisualThickness: The thickness of the visual for the vector.
fields._colliderRotation: The rotation field of the visual collider.
fields._collider: The collider used for the vector.
fields._mesh: The arrow mesh being used to show the vector visual.
